occupation: Head Of Partnerships/Group Sales at Civic Outdoor
headline: Sales And Marketing Specialist at Civic Outdoor
summary: Key Achievements: First female board member of the OMA (Outdoor Media Association) and MOVE (Measurement of Outdoor Visibility and Exposure) // Shortlisted for B&T Women in Media Awards //

experiences.title: Founder/Director
experiences.description: The best quality products are born out of a deep passion and BOco’s range of contemporary pet lifestyle products are a flawless example of this.  The vibrant colours and elegant designs are carefully chosen with current fashion trends in mind. Personalised touches such as monogramming appeal to the discerning dog owner and each piece is made of high quality materials designed to last through your dog’s lifetime. BOco celebrates the unique bond between you and your dog, with high quality products and accessories adding the essential stylish elements to all of your precious moments together.

experiences.company: Map Media Pty Ltd (Successfully Sold to Partner in 2017)
experiences.title: Director
experiences.description: Map Media is a media placement and planning agency specialising in out-of-home advertising, outdoor advertising, OOH advertising. Whatever you prefer to call it you have found a team of experts in MAP Media with 30 years experience in the industry.

experiences.company: Ginger Jones Pty Ltd (Sold in August 2016)
experiences.title: Owner
experiences.description: "The cool cafe wave has reached zone 2 with the opening of Ginger Jones, where great coffee and smart food come in a contemporary semi-industrial setting. The cafe is narrow, with polished concrete floors, whitewashed walls and a sharp timber counter. On-trend brekkies include a vegetarian option with field mushrooms, wilted spinach and house-made baked beans. Free-range eggs come baked, benedict and Atlantic; and buttermilk pancakes with sticky sauces please breakfast dessert devotees. At lunch, look for cafe classics such as crisp-skinned pork belly on slaw, steak sandwich with house-made relish and chicken caesar." - Good Food Guide Under $30 2014

experiences.company: iOM Pty Ltd / Civic Guides Pty Ltd (Sold in July 2016)
experiences.title: General Manager - Sales & Marketing
experiences.description: iOM is an independent outdoor advertising company based in Melbourne with over 30 years of industry experience. Civic Guides is a silo media product that is currently being reimagined to connect mobile technologies with static traditional media. www.iom.net.au/www.civicguides.com.au

experiences.title: Board Member
experiences.description: The Outdoor Media Association (OMA) is the peak national industry body that represents most of Australia’s traditional and digital outdoor media display companies and production facilities, as well as some media display asset owners.

experiences.title: Owner
experiences.description: All Aboard Media seeks to create a medium to express, to ignite, to inspire. We aim to explore the visual textual environment and create art out of words. Born from a love of font based art and a desire to create original and visually stimulating artworks that can translate in a range of environments, All Aboard Media came to life. All Aboard Media aims to enhance residential and commercial environments with their unique typography art.

experiences.title: Marketing & Business Development Manager
experiences.description: I was originally employed by MetroMedia Technologies (reporting directly to the US) for a regional role created to provide cohesive marketing and sales support to MMT’s Asia Pacific operations (key markets: Australia, NZ, India, Malaysia). However in January 2005 the US embarked on a program to divest their international interests and consequently the international marketing department was dissolved and the regional marketing department ceased to exist. I was retained by Australia to continue a marketing and business development function for Australia and New Zealand. Within that role I was relocated to the Melbourne office in August 2005 with the additional brief to manage the Victorian Sales Office.

experiences.title: Marketing & Business Development Manager

volunteer_work.title: Volunteer
volunteer_work.description: The SAIL (Sudanese Australian Integrated Learning) Program is a volunteer-run, non-profit, secular organisation which provides free English support and community services to the Sudanese Australian community.

recommendations:
Srinath Shetty

I worked with Leah for a brief period in MMT ( 1 year), India.I have known leah as a great marketing professional with eye for detail. Whats sets her out - from others is her very innvoative and creative bent of mind. She was instrumental in branding the one print strategy and reverse print strategy in MMT india. She is a fully evolved marketing professional who brings to the table - creativity and a executional brilliance - with thorough knowledge of the ground realities of business.

LinkedIn User

It is rare to find a talent like Leah in the outdoor advertising industry.  I worked under Leah as she was GM at iOM for the 8 years I worked then later as her business partner in Map Media. She is creative and hardworking. Taking on and understanding new technologies and skills whenever possible - it is this that most impresses me about Leah. She never rests on her laurels she is always looking to improve on what she is doing and learn new skill sets. Most would also say that she was always good fun at any social events we had. Overall I worked with Leah for 9 years and can say she is honest and has integrity in what can be a tough industry.  Any employee would be lucky to have Leah as a manager or part of their team.
